LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF GREGORY MURRAY'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND WRIT OF ATTACHMENT THEREOF IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO THE MOVING PARTY FILING THE APPLICATION WITH A DIFFERENT AND MORE FULLER FACTUAL RECORD. PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION DID NOT ADDRESS THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. BASED ON THE OPPOSITION PAPERS, IT CANNOT BE DETERMINED THAT PLAINTIFF WILL LIKELY RECOVER ANY MONEY IN THIS CASE, MUCH LESS A SPECIFIED OR ASCERTAINABLE SUM REQUIRED TO OBTAIN THE RELIEF HE SEEKS. PLAINTIFF'S REPLY EVIDENCE IS NOT BEING CONSIDERED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-01-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2016 Set For Trial On Sep-19-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Application And Application For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment Thereof
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ARNOLD P. PETER, ESQ. of Peter Law Group, Tel No. 310-432-0500 appearing for Plaintiff Gregory Murray;
Atty. GABRIEL D. ZELDIN, ESQ. of Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas Alvarez & Smith LLP, Tel No. 415-421-3400 appearing for Defendant Peter Popjevalo.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court modifies its tentative ruling, and orders as follows: PLAINTIFF GREGORY MURRAY'S Application For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment Thereof is denied without prejudice to the moving party filing the application with a different and more fuller factual record. Plaintiff's application did not address the cross-complaint. Based on the opposition papers, it cannot be determined that plaintiff will likely recover any money in this case, much less a specified or ascertainable sum required to obtain the relief he seeks. Plaintiff's reply evidence is not being considered. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Notice Of Application And Application For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-17-2015 Continued To Feb-01-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
